allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 FullName, LastWriteTime)

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('public/logo.png'\); const w = buf.readUInt32BE\(16\); const h = buf.readUInt32BE\(20\); console.log\('dimensions:', w, 'x', h\); console.log\('size:', fs.statSync\('public/logo.png'\).size, 'bytes'\);")
